content.text:
```mdl
@ Confidentiality (Non‑Disclosure) Agreement
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_12_nda_2

open std.bool

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    includes_personal:   bool,
    includes_financial: bool,
    includes_product:    bool,
    includes_technical:  bool
}

type Party = {
    name: string
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain entities (public model objects)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
entity brooks: Party
entity client: Party
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo

# Boolean flags used by several rules
entity brooks_disclosed_outside: bool   # true if BROOKS has disclosed to an outside party
entity exception_applies: bool          # true if an exception from §3 applies

# Legal‑compulsion information (§4)
entity legal_compel: {
    is_compelled:   bool,
    notified_client: bool
}

# Material‑return information (§5)
entity material: {
    request_received: bool,
    returned:          bool
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – normative requirements from the agreement
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1.1 – definition of “Confidential Information”
rule O confidential_info_definition:
    confidential_info.includes_personal   and
    confidential_info.includes_financial and
    confidential_info.includes_product    and
    confidential_info.includes_technical always

@ Clause 1.2 – BROOKS must not disclose Confidential Information
rule O brooks_no_disclosure:
    not brooks_disclosed_outside or exception_applies always

@ Clause 3 – Exceptions (simplified placeholder)
rule O exception_applies_rule:
    exception_applies always   # detailed logic omitted for brevity

@ Clause 4 – Compelled disclosure notification
rule O brooks_notify_on_compel:
    not legal_compel.is_compelled or legal_compel.notified_client always

@ Clause 5 – Return of material after termination
rule O material_return_upon_request:
    not material.request_received or material.returned always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Hypothesis – to be checked against the model
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
fact hypothesis_confidential_info_only_technical:
    confidential_info.includes_technical  = true  and
    confidential_info.includes_personal   = false and
    confidential_info.includes_financial = false and
    confidential_info.includes_product    = false
```
